{{Quote|We'll have this planet liberated by nightfall.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|<ref name="Skywalkers">{{CWACite|2|Skywalkers}}</ref>}}
In the '''Battle of Terra Sool''', the [[Terra Sool militia|local militia]] rebelled against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] occupation forces, and were aided by a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] task force led by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]].

==The battle==
[[File:BattleofTerraSool.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] infiltrating a [[Conqueror-class atmospheric dreadnaught|''Conqueror''-class atmospheric dreadnaught]]]]
Due to the planet's sensor-blocking atmosphere, they were initially unaware of the presence of massive [[Conqueror-class atmospheric dreadnaught|''Conqueror''-class atmospheric dreadnaughts]] in use by CIS forces that were chewing up the militia fighters. When Kenobi and Skywalker began attacking the platforms, the CIS forces in space started sending waves of missiles to the surface, but they were destroyed by Skywalker, who eliminated them in a series of complex acrobatics. He destroyed the next wave by [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force pushing]] a platform into their path.

==Appearances==
*{{CWACite|2|Skywalkers}} {{1st}} {{Flash}}
